title: STM32 RETURN-TO-HOME DRONE
subtitle: Custom PCB Flight Controller on F450 Frame
description: A full custom-built quadcopter featuring a hand-designed PCB flight controller using the STM32 Blue Pill. The board sits directly on top of the F450 frame, integrating GPS for autonomous return-to-home capability. Project spans 3D modeling, schematic capture, PCB layout, firmware development, and flight testing.

title: PX4 ROI OBJECT TRACKING
subtitle: QGroundControl Region-of-Interest Simulation
description: A simulation-first approach to region-of-interest tracking using PX4 autopilot and QGroundControl. The system autonomously locks onto and tracks a target while maintaining stable flight, demonstrating the full SITL pipeline from algorithm development to mission validation.

title: CHEMICAL HAZARD TESTING RANGER
subtitle: NXP HoverGames 3.0 Competition Entry
description: Competition entry for NXP HoverGames 3.0 — an autonomous drone platform designed to detect and map chemical hazards in disaster zones. Features real-time sensor data telemetry and autonomous survey patterns for first-responder safety assessment.

title: NXP HOVERGAMES CHALLENGE 2
subtitle: Autonomous Drone for Social Good
description: Second-generation HoverGames competition entry leveraging the NXP FMUK66 flight management unit. Focused on using drone technology for social good, integrating computer vision for autonomous mission execution.

title: S500 QUADCOPTER BUILD
subtitle: Multi-Purpose Research Quadcopter Platform
description: A versatile S500-class quadcopter built as a reliable platform for testing flight controllers, sensors, and autonomous navigation algorithms. Designed for modularity, allowing quick payload swaps and sensor integration for research applications.

title: SHARK AERO RC PLANE
subtitle: 3D-Printed Fixed-Wing RC Aircraft
description: A fully 3D-printed fixed-wing RC aircraft designed and manufactured in-house. Demonstrates end-to-end aerospace fabrication: CAD modeling, slicing for FDM printing, structural analysis, assembly, and flight testing of a custom airframe.

title: COLLIDE-O-SCOPE
subtitle: Anti-Collision Drone System
description: A team-developed anti-collision drone system with pitch-deck-ready commercial viability. Features multi-sensor obstacle detection and autonomous avoidance maneuvers for safe operation in cluttered environments.

title: AERIAL CINEMATOGRAPHY REEL
subtitle: Part 107 Certified Drone Videography
description: Professional aerial videography across multiple states — Downtown Austin TX, New York City, Miami FL, Noxubee Lake MS, Fossil Rim TX, and Little Sturgis Rally. All flights conducted under FAA Part 107 certification with proper airspace authorization.
